REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2655 El Camino Del Mar, San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Chicotle in Propria Persona.

The sale was confirmed at $1,259,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived/not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
